tasks.subject: Task 1: Add Go to the CodeQL matrix
tasks.description:
Convert codeql.yml analyze job to a matrix [javascript-typescript build-mode none, go build-mode manual], fail-fast false; conditional setup-go (backend/go.mod) + `working-directory: backend; go build ./...` between init and analyze, both gated to go; languages/build-mode/category from matrix; pins unchanged; header comment updated; gosec kept.

```json:metadata
{"files": [".github/workflows/codeql.yml"], "verifyCommand": "python3 -c \"import yaml; d=yaml.safe_load(open('.github/workflows/codeql.yml')); j=d['jobs']['analyze']; langs={m['language']:m['build-mode'] for m in j['strategy']['matrix']['include']}; assert langs=={'javascript-typescript':'none','go':'manual'}; assert j['strategy']['fail-fast'] is False; print('matrix ok')\"", "spec": "docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-01-codeql-go-design.md"}
```
